evals.prompt: Add a book tagging feature to BookStore. A book can have multiple plain-string tags (e.g. 'bestseller', 'staff-pick'). Create `TagAddedToBook` and `TagRemovedFromBook` events in src/BookStore.ApiService/Events/BookEvents.cs, `AddTagToBook` and `RemoveTagFromBook` commands in src/BookStore.ApiService/Commands/Books/BookCommands.cs, Wolverine handlers in src/BookStore.ApiService/Handlers/Books/, and `POST /books/{id}/tags` and `DELETE /books/{id}/tags/{tag}` endpoints in src/BookStore.ApiService/Endpoints/BookEndpoints.cs. Update BookAggregate to track the tags list. Write unit tests in tests/BookStore.ApiService.UnitTests/ following the existing AuthorAggregateTests.cs pattern.
evals.expected_output: New past-tense event records TagAddedToBook and TagRemovedFromBook, command records AddTagToBook and RemoveTagFromBook, Wolverine handler methods, two new endpoints wired into BookEndpoints.cs, BookAggregate updated with a Tags property and Apply methods, and at least one TUnit test class using [Test] async Task with Bogus for data generation and Guid.CreateVersion7() throughout.

assertions.text: Event records are named in past tense: TagAddedToBook and TagRemovedFromBook appear in the output.
Guid.CreateVersion7() is used wherever a new Guid is generated; Guid.NewGuid() does not appear in any output file.
DateTimeOffset.UtcNow is used for any timestamp; DateTime.Now and DateTime.UtcNow do not appear in output files.
All C# files use file-scoped namespace declarations (namespace Foo.Bar;) rather than braced namespace blocks.
At least one test file is created or modified under tests/ containing a [Test] attribute.
[Fact] and [TestMethod] attributes do not appear in any output file; [Test] is used instead.
Test data uses Bogus (Faker<T> or new Faker()) rather than hand-rolled values.
[LoggerMessage] attribute is used for logging; direct logger.LogInformation / LogWarning / LogError calls do not appear in output files.
BookAggregate is modified to include a Tags property and Apply methods for TagAddedToBook and TagRemovedFromBook.
Wolverine handler methods for AddTagToBook and RemoveTagFromBook appear in at least one output file under src/BookStore.ApiService/Handlers/.
A POST /books/{id}/tags or equivalent route registration appears in at least one output file.
A DELETE /books/{id}/tags/{tag} or equivalent route registration appears in at least one output file.
AddTagToBook and RemoveTagFromBook command records appear in at least one output file under src/BookStore.ApiService/Commands/.
DateTime.Now does not appear in any output file.
Guid.NewGuid() does not appear in any output file.

evals.prompt: Add a 'view count' feature to BookStore. When a client calls a new `POST /books/{id}/view` endpoint, record a `BookViewed` event and increment a separate Marten read model `BookViewCount` (fields: BookId, Count) via a Marten projection in src/BookStore.ApiService/Projections/. Add the event to src/BookStore.ApiService/Events/BookEvents.cs, the command `RecordBookView` to src/BookStore.ApiService/Commands/Books/BookCommands.cs, a Wolverine handler in src/BookStore.ApiService/Handlers/Books/BookHandlers.cs, and the endpoint in src/BookStore.ApiService/Endpoints/BookEndpoints.cs. Expose the read model via GET /books/{id}/view-count. Write unit tests for the projection in tests/BookStore.ApiService.UnitTests/Projections/.
evals.expected_output: New BookViewed event record, RecordBookView command, Wolverine handler, two new endpoint registrations, a BookViewCount projection class implementing IProjection or SingleStreamProjection, and a projection unit test class following existing projection test patterns with [Test] async Task methods.

assertions.text: The event record is named BookViewed (past tense) and appears in at least one output file.
A class named BookViewCount or BookViewCountProjection is created in a file under src/ or appears in the output.
Guid.CreateVersion7() is used wherever a new Guid is generated; Guid.NewGuid() does not appear in any output file.
All C# files use file-scoped namespace declarations (namespace Foo.Bar;) rather than braced blocks.
At least one test file is created or modified under tests/ that exercises the projection or handler.
The handler returns a Result type or wraps errors in ProblemDetails; naked throw statements for validation errors do not appear.
DateTimeOffset.UtcNow is used for any timestamp; DateTime.Now and DateTime.UtcNow do not appear in output files.
[Fact] and [TestMethod] attributes do not appear in any output file; [Test] is used instead.
Test data uses Bogus (Faker<T> or new Faker()) rather than hand-rolled values in the unit tests.
[LoggerMessage] is used for logging; direct _logger.LogInformation / LogWarning / LogError calls do not appear.
A Wolverine handler method for RecordBookView appears in at least one output file under src/BookStore.ApiService/Handlers/.
A POST /books/{id}/view or equivalent route registration appears in at least one output file.
A GET /books/{id}/view-count or equivalent route is defined in at least one output file.
A RecordBookView command record appears in at least one output file under src/BookStore.ApiService/Commands/.
Guid.NewGuid() does not appear in any output file.

evals.prompt: Add a featured-books section to the BookStore Blazor frontend. Create a new Blazor component at src/BookStore.Web/Components/Catalog/FeaturedBooks.razor that fetches books where IsFeatured is true via the existing IBookStoreClient and displays up to 6 featured books as cards with title and cover image. Integrate the component into the main catalog page (src/BookStore.Web/Components/Catalog/). Add a GET /books/featured endpoint in src/BookStore.ApiService/Endpoints/BookEndpoints.cs backed by a Marten query on the BookSearchProjection. Write a bUnit component test in tests/BookStore.Web.UnitTests/ verifying the component renders correctly when the client returns a non-empty list.
evals.expected_output: A new FeaturedBooks.razor component that injects IBookStoreClient and renders books, a new /books/featured API endpoint, and a bUnit test class using [Test] async Task with NSubstitute to mock IBookStoreClient.

assertions.text: A file named FeaturedBooks.razor is created and appears in the output.
IBookStoreClient is used in the component or service layer; direct HttpClient usage does not appear.
A /books/featured or equivalent route is defined in at least one output file.
At least one test file is created under tests/ that references FeaturedBooks or the featured endpoint.
Task.Delay and Thread.Sleep do not appear in any output file.
Guid.CreateVersion7() is used wherever a new Guid is generated; Guid.NewGuid() does not appear in any output file.
All C# files use file-scoped namespace declarations (namespace Foo.Bar;) rather than braced namespace blocks.
[Fact] and [TestMethod] attributes do not appear in any output file; [Test] is used instead.
NSubstitute is used to mock IBookStoreClient or equivalent in at least one test file.
[LoggerMessage] is used for any backend logging; direct _logger.Log* calls do not appear in output files.
Guid.NewGuid() does not appear in any output file.
DateTime.Now does not appear in any output file.
The featured endpoint registration appears in at least one output file under src/BookStore.ApiService/Endpoints/.
FeaturedBooks component is referenced in at least one page or parent Blazor component in the output.
A GetFeaturedBooksAsync or equivalent method is added to IBooksClient or the client interface in at least one output file.
